headline: Will VICI’s (VICI) Canadian Casino Deal and 25-Year Lease Shift Its Income Resilience Narrative?
summary: VICI Properties Inc. recently completed its acquisition of the real estate assets of Deerfoot Inn & Casino, Great Northern Casino and two adjacent limited-service hotels in Alberta, Canada for C$200.6 million (US$144.4 million), folding them into its existing triple-net master lease with PURE and lifting annual rent by C$16.1 million (US$11.6 million). The deal not only extends the PURE master lease to a full 25-year initial term with inflation-linked rent escalators, but also deepens VICI’s...
